propositions: Local git commits to main/master are not blocked at commit time and are only caught later at push/review.
The no-commit-to-branch hook should be added to .pre-commit-config.yaml under the pre-commit/pre-commit-hooks repo block to fail fast locally.
The hook should use explicit args listing both main and master to document intent and be robust to upstream default changes.
This is a local fail-fast convenience only, complementing existing server-side GitHub ruleset and Gerrit gate enforcement, and remains bypassable with --no-verify.
Existing local lint/typecheck and YAML hygiene hooks must remain unaffected.
